## Conclusion and analysis

## In our data analysis of student majors and the count of each, we found that biology, economics, and neuroscience are the most popular majors among students. Additionally, computer science is among the lowest major count. This could support our idea of incorporating different academic fields into our curriculum. This can be useful for comp110 to be more interesting and useful to the students taking it. Potential downsides could be that the comp110 teaching team needs to edit exercises and lessons to better accomodate student interests. This idea still needs a lot of refinement, for example, identifying what exactly to add to assignment themes to make them more engaging. 

## why does our data matter?

# Idea to analyze with available data: The course should implement lessons that are correlated with majors other than computer science for students of other disciplines. This idea is more valuable than the others brainstormed because: the data collected is more relevant to the idea, which will make it easier to analyze
